name: GLADSTONE CAPITAL CORP
summary: Gladstone Capital Corp (GLAD) is a business development company (BDC) that operates as a regulated investment company (RIC) under the Internal Revenue Code. It provides debt and equity financing to small and mid-sized private companies in the United States. The company is externally managed by Gladstone Management Corporation (the Adviser) and focuses on generating income and capital gains through its investment portfolio.
